jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Doubtnut
jsonLd.description:
Doubtnut invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Doubtnut:
Doubtnut is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Doubtnut!
